tagline: A resizable master-detail two-pane shell with a draggable separator.
whenToUse: Split View is the master-detail pattern — a list pane beside a detail pane with a draggable, keyboard-operable separator. Reach for it in Messages, Disputes, or any browse-then-read flow where the selection stays visible. On mobile it collapses to one pane at a time with a back button. Use Sidebar Layout instead when the side pane is navigation rather than a selectable list.
